name: score-efp
description: One function: read a wallet's social-trust signal from Ethereum Follow Protocol (EFP) — followers + following counts. Free, no auth, public reads only. Replaces the previous Gitcoin Passport endpoint that required an API key.

tools.name: trust_score
tools.description: Returns EFP follower/following counts for the given address — a social-trust heuristic that doesn't need API keys. High follower count = wallet has built up a reputation in EFP's social graph.

address.description: Ethereum address (or ENS name) to look up
